defaultDivisionId.description: Default division to use when divisionId is omitted from an imported order.

orderMatchByFields.description: Fields to match existing orders. If null or empty, falls back to orderId when provided.

orderEntityMatchByFields.description: Fields used to match existing order entities. Supports nested values like contact.name.

orderEntityContactMatchByFields.description: Fields used to match contacts nested inside order entities.

billToContactMatchByFields.description: Fields used to match the bill-to contact.

contactAddressMatchByFields.description: Fields to match existing contact addresses within order entities.

inventoryItemMatchByFields.description: Fields to match existing inventory items on commodities.

inventoryItemCustomerContactMatchByField.description: Fields used to match customer contacts nested inside inventory items.

commodityMatchByTrackingNumber.description: When true, commodities can be matched by tracking number-oriented data instead of commodityId.

createEventDefinitions.description: Auto-create missing tracking event definitions during import. Default: true.

eventDefinitionDefaults.description: Default values applied when creating event definitions during import.

trackingEventMatchByFields.description: Fields used to deduplicate imported tracking events.

matchByEventDefinition.description: Fields on eventDefinition customValues used to match event definitions instead of eventDefinitionName.

skipIfExists.description: Skip importing tracking events that already exist based on the configured match fields. Default: true.

linkTrackingEventsToCommodities.description: When true, imported tracking events are linked to the order's first-level (non-container) commodities. Default: false.

skipValues.description: Controls whether null/empty values in the import payload are stripped before updating existing orders, commodities, and order entities. None: overwrite with nulls; Null: skip null values; NullOrEmpty: skip null and empty strings (default). Prevents feed data that stops returning fields (e.g. ETA after delivery) from wiping existing data.
